## Skill Name

<!-- e.g. database-migration, performance-testing -->

## Problem It Solves

<!-- What gap does this skill fill? What can't you do well today without it? -->

## Which Phase Does It Belong To?

<!-- Reference the phase table in README.md. Is this a new phase or does it augment an existing one? -->

## Suggested Book Grounding (optional)

<!-- If this skill should be grounded in a specific book, name it and explain which concepts apply. -->

## Example Usage

<!-- Describe a scenario where this skill would be invoked. What would the input and output look like? -->
